title: Elegos A'Kla (Imperial-class)

The '''''Elegos A'Kla''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|Navy]]; the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was named for [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] and martyr [[Elegos A'Kla]]. The ship played a major role in a number of conflicts during the later stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The ship served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] during most of its service in the war.

Completed at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the ''Elegos A'Kla'' was one of a group of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] named after important [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] leaders. It was also, along with its sister ship [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']], one of the first ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers to include [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] projectors. These new projectors required less power and had a streamlined form, removing the characteristic globes of the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]].
